transcript: style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |...Oh, future call sale. Those races, get out there and run a marathon. You haven’t done that for a while, will ya? [laughs] 804-8055 is our phone number.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |And we go next to Tob... Toby, on 760. Hello Toby.

style="width: 88%; text-align:left;; background: #141315; color: #B090C5;" |I wanted to talk a little bit about [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Evonne_Goolagong_Cawley Evonne Goolagong] this afternoon.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;; background: #141315; color: #B090C5;" |Evonne Goolagong. Now, um... well, she knew how to smack the tennis ball.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;; background: #141315; color: #B090C5;" |Uh... what did...
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |You want to talk about Evonne Goolagong?
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |Is that... am I hearing you correctly? You want to talk about Evonne Goolagong?
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |[laughs] Alright, go ahead. What about her?
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;; background: #141315; color: #B090C5;" |She'll... she’ll smack the tennis ball. Um...

style="width: 88%; text-align:left;; background: #141315; color: #B090C5;" |Do you know anything about the, uh, rematch over on Smoky Hill Road there, with, uh, Goolagong and [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tom_Gugliotta Gugliotta], scheduled to take place?
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |What?! Red dog! We're not following you.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |I'm not sure. Uh, that was a little different.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |One thing... I think, hey, I either had too long of a weekend...
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |Or, this man has started early.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |That guy... that call was about as much fun as pink eye.
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |In... in either case we’ve got to, uh...
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |We've got to... pick it up a little bit, don't we?
style="width: 88%; text-align:left;" |That’s right. Let’s go to Jeff, we’re looking for those free agents... [unclear]
